testcase.name: test_create_agenda_event
testcase.failure: tests/test_audit_features.py:320: in test_create_agenda_event assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create event failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create event failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","start_datetime"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"title":"TEST_Journée Portes Ouvertes","description":"Venez découvrir nos nouveaux soins","event_type":"event","start_time":"2025-02-15T10:00:00","end_time":"2025-02-15T18:00:00","location":"Spa Luxury Lausanne"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","end_datetime"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"title":"TEST_Journée Portes Ouvertes","description":"Venez découvrir nos nouveaux soins","event_type":"event","start_time":"2025-02-15T10:00:00","end_time":"2025-02-15T18:00:00","location":"Spa Luxury Lausanne"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_add_team_member
testcase.failure: tests/test_audit_features.py:356: in test_add_team_member assert response.status_code == 200, f"Add team member failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Add team member failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","first_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Marie Dupont","role":"Esthéticienne Senior","email":"marie.test@spa.com","phone":"+41 79 123 45 67"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","last_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Marie Dupont","role":"Esthéticienne Senior","email":"marie.test@spa.com","phone":"+41 79 123 45 67"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
